meta.title: Jonathan Brownstein — Remote Data Architect
meta.description: Data architect with fifteen years designing enterprise lakehouse and warehouse solutions, governed analytical assets, and scalable ELT pipelines in regulated environments. I establish data standards, metadata and lineage

hero.description: Data architect with fifteen years designing enterprise lakehouse and warehouse solutions, governed analytical assets, and scalable ELT pipelines in regulated environments. I establish data standards, metadata and lineage frameworks, and architecture patterns supporting quality, security, and self service analytics. Contract work spans trillion record warehouse programs, Databricks lakehouse delivery, and Power BI and Tableau reporting layers. Available immediately for remote contract work from northern Illinois.

highlights.label: Enterprise data architecture, data modeling, data warehouse design, lakehouse architecture, ELT pipelines, data governance, data standards, metadata management, data lineage, data quality, Python, SQL, Databricks, cloud data platforms, performance optimization, self service analytics, Power BI, Tableau, stakeholder partnership, remote contract delivery

items.title: Senior Enterprise Data Architect and Lakehouse Specialist
items.organization: Regulated financial services enterprise, remote hybrid contract, Chief Data Office ecosystem
bullets: Led lakehouse and warehouse architecture across actuarial, finance, and operational domains with governed analytical assets.
Established metadata, lineage, and data standards adopted as the authoritative reference for a trillion record warehouse program.
Architected ELT pipelines and reusable data models with governance, quality controls, and self service Power BI and Tableau reporting layers.

items.title: Data Architecture and Analytics Modernization Consultant
items.organization: Global manufacturing group, regional finance leadership
bullets: Modernized reporting architecture and automated KPI frameworks for finance and operations leadership.
Translated business requirements into scoped data models and recurring analytical outputs on planning timelines.

items.title: Contract Data Architecture Validation Analyst
items.organization: Commercial banking and public sector financial systems, part time contract
bullets: Validated warehouse reporting outputs against source systems with documented reconciliation and sign off routines.
